topic: A silhouette shows through my shower curtain when I am not in the shower.
title: A Silhouette Behind My Shower Curtain | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: A silhouette showed through my shower curtain when no one was inside.
scenes.image_prompt: A closed translucent shower curtain with a faint dark shape behind it, dim bathroom light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My bathroom was small, the tub tucked behind a plastic curtain.
scenes.image_prompt: A narrow bathroom with a bathtub hidden behind a pale shower curtain, frosted window, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I always left the curtain open after drying off.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty bathtub with the shower curtain pushed fully to one side, dripping faucet, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But each evening I found it drawn shut.
scenes.image_prompt: A shower curtain pulled completely closed across a tub, soft folds, dim warm light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My breath caught in my throat.
scenes.image_prompt: A bathroom doorway looking toward a closed shower curtain, faint shape behind the plastic, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Behind the plastic stood the outline of a tall figure.
scenes.image_prompt: A dark elongated human silhouette pressing faintly against a translucent shower curtain, dim cold light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I tore the curtain back. The tub sat empty and dry.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty dry bathtub with the curtain yanked aside, water stains on the wall, low light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It happened every night. Curtain shut. Shape waiting inside.
scenes.image_prompt: A shadowy figure outline behind a closed shower curtain, faint light from above, fog in the air, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I took the curtain down completely and hid it in the closet.
scenes.image_prompt: A bare shower rod with no curtain over an empty tub, dim bathroom light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: That night the bare tub still held a standing shadow.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty bathtub with no curtain, a faint dark shape rising from the drain end, cold dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I started showering at a friend's place across town.
scenes.image_prompt: A packed overnight bag on a bathroom floor, the tub empty behind it, gray light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My friend asked why a wet figure stood in her tub.
scenes.image_prompt: A dripping shower curtain in an unfamiliar bathroom, faint dark outline behind it, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
